---

**Install:** clone the repo or download the attached `DevDepot-vX.Y.Z.zip`, then run
`pwsh -File .\DevDepot.ps1 analyze`. Requires PowerShell 7+ on Windows 10/11.

Full changelog: https://github.com/duxdraco/dux-win-dev-depot/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

Developed and maintained by **Dux Draco**.
